scripts.test:smoke:core: NODE_ENV=test STORAGE_DRIVER=mock DATABASE_URL= BACKEND_PUBLIC_URL=http://127.0.0.1 node src/scripts/smoke-test.js
scripts.test:smoke:auth: NODE_ENV=test AUTH_MODE=jwt JWT_SECRET=smoke-jwt-secret STORAGE_DRIVER=mock DATABASE_URL= BACKEND_PUBLIC_URL=http://127.0.0.1 node src/scripts/auth-smoke-test.js
scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:smoke:core && npm run test:smoke:auth
